title: moldavica moldavica
intro: Moldavica moldavica, also known as Moldavian snakeroot, is a perennial plant species in the Boraginaceae family. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Moldavica moldavica include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a natural remedy for anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of Moldavica moldavica are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
